name: Garden Squash and Nasturtium Butter Pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate nasturtiums from stems and chop them.
2. Blend the flowers, shallots, and herbs together with butter and season with salt and pepper.
3. Slice the squash into thin rounds and squash blossoms into ribbons. Keep each separate.
4. Gently sauté the squash alone in half the nasturtium butter for 2 to 3 minutes.
5. Add chicken stock and squash blossoms, and simmer while cooking the pasta.
6. Drain the pasta and add it with the remaining nasturtium butter to the squash; season and mix well.
7. Serve garnished with additional nasturtium blossoms.
Variation: Delicate vegetables that won't overpower nasturtium butter - for example, whole shallots, fava beans, peas, or leeks - can be added or used in place of squash.
